name: lmarbles
title: lmarbles
summary: game where you build figures out of colored marbles
description:
game where you build figures out of colored marbles
The goal of this game is to create a more or less complex figure
out of single marbles within a time limit to reach the next level.
Sounds easy? Well, there is a problem: If a marble starts to move,
it will not stop until it hits a wall or another marble.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use lmarbles because game where you build figures out of colored marbles.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use lmarbles as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair lmarbles with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `lmarbles --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
